description_long: This hotel is a large, modern, low-rise building with a flat roof and a sprawling rectangular footprint, surrounded by a perimeter fence. The main structure features multiple levels, with a prominent central entrance and several exterior staircases and terraces. The grounds include a spacious outdoor pool area with lounge seating, circular patios, and landscaped greenery, as well as a dedicated parking area with marked spaces. The facade is primarily composed of light-colored materials, with large windows and glass doors providing natural light to the interior. The hotel appears to offer various amenities such as outdoor seating, recreational spaces, and landscaped walkways, making it suitable for both leisure and business guests. The overall design emphasizes openness, accessibility, and comfort, with a blend of functional and aesthetic elements.
description: A large, modern hotel with a flat roof, extensive outdoor pool area, landscaped grounds, and a light-colored facade featuring many windows and terraces. The building is surrounded by a fence and includes parking and recreational spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the hotel from the front, highlighting the main entrance, outdoor pool area, and the fenced perimeter with circular patios and lounge seating.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the hotel from the left side, revealing the parking area, landscaped greenery, and the side elevation with additional windows and terraces.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the hotel, focusing on the parking lot, secondary entrances, and the back garden area with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: View 3 captures the right side of the hotel, emphasizing the pool area, side terraces, and the continuation of the perimeter fence.
